case_title: ANTHONY W BELMONTE VS. JAMES CROWLEY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER THAT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BE ENTERED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROWLEY, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT #516, SF, TOGETHER W/ALL ATTNDNT PARKING,STORAGE & COMMON AREAS $1,692.55 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,692.55, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION" (AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY W AS TO DEFENDANT CROWLEY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CROWLEY, JAMES
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF UD JUDGMNT & ENTRY OF JUDGMNT PERSUANT TO STIP; DECL OF PLTF; ORDER THEREON FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY W
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY W
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CROWLEY, JAMES
